description_long: This street cabinet is a robust, octagonal kiosk with a metallic body and yellow accent panels on the upper corners. The front and adjacent faces feature large, vertically oriented digital touchscreens displaying maps, event information, and advertisements in Korean. The top of the cabinet is flat and dark, with a prominent information symbol ("i") at the center, indicating its function as an information point. On the side panels, there are card readers and possibly ticket or receipt dispensers, suggesting interactive capabilities for public use. The cabinet is designed to be weather-resistant and tamper-proof, suitable for installation in busy urban environments such as sidewalks or plazas. Its overall appearance is modern, functional, and intended for high-traffic public spaces.
description: A modern, octagonal street information kiosk with large digital touchscreens, yellow accents, and interactive card reader panels, designed for public urban use.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the cabinet with a large digital display advertising an event, a card reader on the left, and the information symbol on top.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a different digital screen with event information and a visible card reader, with the yellow accent more prominent on the upper edge.
description_view_2: This view displays a digital map and time on the main screen, with the information symbol clearly visible on the top panel.
description_view_3: This view shows another map interface on the screen, with a smiley face icon and the yellow accent on the upper corners.
